creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Challenge your besties to an ultimate adventure @tepfactor.dubai! 

TEP Factor in JBR-The Walk is a cavelike recreation park with 21 challenges in 4 categories (Logic, Skills, Fitness, Patience). It’s great for team building, occasions, and just for a fun day out with friends and family members! 

🎟️ 99 AED per person/hour

Tag your adventure buddies!
